targets.queryText: SELECT goal_progress_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT goal_progress_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT projected_monthly_income AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT projected_monthly_income AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT goal_target_monthly AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT goal_target_monthly AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT goal_months_remaining AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT goal_months_remaining AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, goal_progress_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-180 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, goal_progress_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-180 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;

targets.queryText: SELECT tier_number AS tier, tier_name AS name, ROUND(months_to_goal, 0) AS months, UPPER(confidence) AS confidence FROM goal_tiers ORDER BY tier_number LIMIT 6;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT tier_number AS tier, tier_name AS name, ROUND(months_to_goal, 0) AS months, UPPER(confidence) AS confidence FROM goal_tiers ORDER BY tier_number LIMIT 6;
